title: Software Engineer
description: Develop and maintain scalable web applications. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design and ship reliable product features.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field.
3+ years of experience in full-stack development.

title: Content Writer
description: Create engaging blog posts, product copy, and newsletters. Work closely with marketing teams to maintain brand voice and consistency.
qualifications: Portfolio of long-form and short-form content.

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze operational and customer data to generate actionable insights. Build dashboards and recurring reports for business stakeholders.
qualifications: 2+ years of SQL and spreadsheet analysis experience.
Experience with data visualization tools such as Tableau or Power BI.

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Design user-centric interfaces and workflows for web products. Conduct usability reviews and create prototypes for stakeholder feedback.
qualifications: Strong portfolio of product design work.
Proficiency with Figma and prototyping tools.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Maintain cloud infrastructure, automate CI/CD workflows, and improve deployment reliability across environments.
qualifications: Experience with AWS or GCP cloud services.
Hands-on experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines.

title: Customer Support Representative
description: Support customers through chat and email, troubleshoot product issues, and escalate technical concerns to engineering teams.
qualifications: Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
1+ year of customer support experience in a SaaS environment.
